subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou dost witness and behold what hath befallen me at the hands of them that have disbelieved in Thy most great signs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی تشهد و تری ما ورد علی من الذینهم کفروا بایاتک الکبری و
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for detachment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement
